notes: IBM PowerPC 970 (64-bit, POWER4-derived) shipped in Apple Power Mac G5 Aug 2003; never reached 3 GHz; replaced by Intel transition 2006
AMD 64-bit extension of x86 (Opteron Apr 2003, Athlon 64 Sep 2003); Intel adopted as Intel 64 (EM64T) 2004; became dominant 64-bit desktop/server ISA
First-generation Double Data Rate SDRAM; 200-400 MT/s; Power Mac G5 used 400 MHz DDR; displaced by DDR2 2004-2006
